---
title: epoch-naming
description: "Include epoch units in variable names."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Include epoch units in variable names. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
createdAt := time.Now().Unix()
```

## Good

```go
createdSeconds := time.Now().Unix()
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only epoch-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
